zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de la Lynde於1220年出生在英國多瑟特文特爾布恩 可倫斯同時，他的父親Robert de la Lynde II40歲，母親Alice Advice of Outwell35歲。他與Joan de Neville結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1273年12月10日在他的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特文特爾波內 阿巴斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Lynde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lind
meanings: Scandinavian, English, and Dutch: topographic name for someone who lived by a lime tree, Scandinavian and Middle English lind. As a Swedish name, it is often of ornamental origin.
North German and Danish: habitational name from any of various places called with Lind ‘lime tree’.
South German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for a gentle, mild, tolerant man, from Middle High German lint, linde, Yiddish lind ‘gentle, mild’.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de la Lynde was born in 1220, in Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, England, his father, Robert de la Lynde II, was 40 and his mother, Alice Advice of Outwell, was 35. He married Joan de Neville. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 10 December 1273, in his hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Winterborne Abbas, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de la Lynde est né en 1220, à Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Robert de la Lynde II, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Alice Advice of Outwell, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Neville. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 décembre 1273, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Winterborne Abbas, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de la Lynde 1220 in Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de la Lynde II 40 und seine Mutter Alice Advice of Outwell 35. Er hat Joan de Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. Dezember 1273 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Winterborne Abbas, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de la Lynde è nato il nel 1220 nel Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, England, il suo padre, Robert de la Lynde II, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Alice Advice of Outwell, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Neville. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 dicembre 1273, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Winterborne Abbas, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de la Lyndeが1220年にイギリスドールセトウィンテルボウルン クレンストーンで生まれた時，父Robert de la Lynde IIは40歳，母Alice Advice of Outwellは35歳であった。Joan de Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1273年12月10日に故郷で53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトウィンテルボルン アッバスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de la Lynde(이)가 1220년 영국 도르세트 윈터보우른 클렌스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de la Lynde II(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Advice of Outwell(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Joan de Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1273년 12월 10일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 윈터본 애브바스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de la Lynde nasceu em 1220, em Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de la Lynde II, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Alice Advice of Outwell, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Neville. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de la Lynde родился в 1220 г. в местности винтирбурн кленстоун, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de la Lynde II было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Advice of Outwell, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Neville. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 декабря 1273 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности винтирборн эббас, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Joan de Neville. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de diciembre de 1273, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Winterborne Abbas, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
